title: An AI Model Cut Protein-Structure Guesswork to Near-Experimental Accuracy

claims.text: A deep-learning system predicts protein backbone structure to a median accuracy within experimental error on standard benchmarks.

verdict.note: Abstract + Fig. 2 report median backbone RMSD within experimental error on CASP14.

claims.text: The model's accuracy drops sharply for proteins with few evolutionary relatives.

verdict.note: Stated as a limitation in s1; independently reproduced on an orphan-protein set in s2.

sources.title: Highly accurate protein structure prediction with AlphaFold
